description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named generate bundles that runs on every push. It should have two jobs: build-win and publish_packages. The build-win job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x64 architecture and AI readiness. It checks out the repository with submodules, sets up the environment, and performs various build steps. The publish_packages job runs after build-win, also on windows-latest, and currently only outputs a test message.
